## [2.13.0] - 2026-04-26

### Changes
* update yarn.lock (#1358)
* add github token to the profiler job (#1359)
* fix pedantic lints (#1350)
* deserialize GitLab API data models safely (#1368)
* use updated usage of `doc_auto_cfg` and fix internal link (#1373)
* apply latest tag to stable only (#1371)
* use `reqwest::Response::error_for_status` (#1374)
* optimize tsup and tsconfig for node 18+ cli (#1382)
* standardize on yarn and fix invalid changelog anchor link (#1383)
* configure lychee --root-dir (#1423)
* add environment variable for offline execution (#1427)
* install ca-certificates in docker image (#1425)
* update lychee.toml to stabilize 502 error (#1424)
* align @types/node with Node.js 18.19+ support (#1388)
* hydration error (#1445)
* correctly parse multiple env values for include/exclude paths (#1450)
* fix pedantic lint (#1375)
* add site crawler for console error (#1444)
* improve parsing rules for commits without scope (#1453)
* add more-examples section for templates (#1472)
* use `require.resolve` to resolve binary path (#1392)
* raise MSRV to 1.87.0 (#1479)
* replace dirs_next with etcetera (#1477)
* warn when `--with-commit` does not change version (#1484)
* add include-path multi-value handling tests (#1456)
* add test fixture for skipped contributors (#1481)
* support more configuration file locations (#1448)
* add caching where applicable (#1486)
* expose determined bump type in release context (#1483)
* add configurable commit processing order (#1485)
* add per-commit statistics (#1487)
* migrate logging to tracing (#1488)
* publish musl wheels to PyPI by matching matrix.build.NAME (#1490)
* add highlights for 2.13.0 (#1491)

### New Contributors
* @sermuns made their first contribution in [#1373, #1486]
